revision.text: [[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{{1|Example User}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{1|Example User}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example User}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=move&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}}}} page moves]{{middot}}[https://tools.wmflabs.org/xtools/autoblock/?user={{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}} current autoblocks]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} block log]) {{doc|content= {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
